message:
feat(freeze): add inline caches for property access in relooper codegen

Add per-call-site inline caches (IC) for all get_field/get_field2
property accesses in the relooper codegen. Each IC slot caches
(shape_ptr, prop_offset, atom) - on cache hit, reads the property
directly from the object's prop array in Zig (zero FFI calls).
On miss, falls back to atom-cached JS_GetProperty.

- Add js_frozen_ic_load C function in QuickJS patch
- Add ICSlot struct and icLoad with Zig-inlined fast path
- Replace native cache special cases with uniform IC in relooper
- Pre-scan bytecode for IC slot count to size static arrays

Covers 5,814 property access sites across 350 relooper shards.
Performance is at parity (~13.5s) - property access caching is not
the bottleneck; C FFI overhead dominates the 13x gap vs Node.
